zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Woodward於1535年出生在英國奧可福爾時，她的母親Agnes Mitchell24歲，父親George Woodward28歲。她於1550年與William Poynter在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1557年8月25日在英國奧可福爾萊斯頓享年22歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭德比夏爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Woodward于1535年出生在英国奧可福爾时，她的母亲Agnes Mitchell24岁，父亲George Woodward28岁。她于1550年与William Poynter在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1557年8月25日在英国奧可福爾萊斯頓享年22岁，埋葬在英国英格兰德比夏爾。

nameMeanings.name: Woodward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a forester employed to look after the trees and game in a forest, Middle English woodward (from Old English wudu ‘wood’ + weard ‘guardian, protector’).

History: Henry Woodward emigrated from England in 1635 and settled first in Dorchester, MA, and subsequently in Northampton, MA. He had many prominent descendants. Another Henry Woodward, born c. 1646 in the British West Indies, was the first English settler in SC (1664).

variants.name: Woodard
meanings: from the Norman Old French personal name Odard, Udard, Middle English Wodard, Wudard. It derives from the ancient Germanic name Authard, Othard, Odard, composed of the elements aud- ‘riches' + hard- ‘hard, bold’.
occupational name from Middle English wode ‘wood’ + herde ‘herd’ (Old English wudu + hierde), for a person who tended animals pastured in woodland.

variants.name: Woodworth
meanings: English (Lancashire): variant of Woodward or Wadworth, the latter being a habitational name from Wadworth in Yorkshire, which is derived from the Old English personal name Wada, Wadda + Old English worth ‘enclosure’.

variants.name: Woodman
meanings: occupational name for a woodcutter or a forester (compare Woodward ), from Middle English wodeman ‘woodman’. In some instances this may be a variant of Wadman .
from the Middle English personal name Wudemann (Old English Wuduman, from wudu ‘wood’ + mann ‘man’).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.description: Henry VIII dies, succeeded by the boy king Edward VI. England and Ireland were ruled by the senior nobility of England.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Woodward was born in 1535, in Oxfordshire, England, her mother, Agnes Mitchell, was 24 and her father, George Woodward, was 28. She married William Poynter in 1550, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 25 August 1557, in Wroxton, Oxfordshire, England, at the age of 22, and was buried in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Woodward est née en 1535, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, sa mère, Agnes Mitchell, avait 24 ans et son père, George Woodward, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé William Poynter en 1550, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 25 août 1557, à Wroxton, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 22 ans, et a été enterrée à Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Woodward 1535 in Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihre Mutter Agnes Mitchell 24 und ihr Vater George Woodward 28. Sie hat 1550 in England William Poynter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 25. August 1557 im Alter von 22 Jahren in Wroxton, Oxfordshire, England und wurde in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Woodward è nata il nel 1535 nel Oxfordshire, England, sua madre, Agnes Mitchell, aveva 24 anni e sua padre, George Woodward, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato William Poynter nel 1550, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 25 agosto 1557, nel Wroxton, Oxfordshire, England, all'età di 22 anni, e fu sepolta a Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Woodwardが1535年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，母Agnes Mitchellは24歳，父George Woodwardは28歳であった。1550年にイギリスでWilliam Poynterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1557年8月25日にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアウロクストンで22歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Woodward(이)가 1535년 영국 스퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Mitchell(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 아버지 George Woodward(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1550년 영국에서 William Poynter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1557년 8월 25일 영국 스퍼드실르 록스턴에서 22세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Woodward nasceu em 1535, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, sua mãe, Agnes Mitchell, tinha 24 anos e seu pai, George Woodward, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com William Poynter em 1550, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 25 de agosto de 1557, em Wroxton, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, com 22 anos, e foi sepultada em Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Woodward родилась в 1535 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия, её матери по имени Agnes Mitchell было 24 года, а отцу, которого звали George Woodward, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Poynter в 1550 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 25 августа 1557 г. в местности рокстон, оксфордшир, Англия в возрасте 22 лет и была похоронена в местности дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Woodward nació en 1535, en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, su mamá, Agnes Mitchell, tenía 24 años y su papá, George Woodward, tenía 28 años. Se casó con William Poynter en 1550, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 25 de agosto de 1557, en Wroxton, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 22 años, y fue sepultada en Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
